message:
test(undo, spotlight, quake): add 42 unit tests across four modules

Undo history (8 tests): config constructors, config accessor, limited
undo/redo descriptions, memory byte-limit eviction, memory tracking
across undo/redo cycle.

Undo transaction (7 tests): Transaction::execute method, finalized
rejects execute, scope execute without transaction, scope commit/rollback
without begin errors, multi-command rollback order, Debug impl.

Spotlight (15 tests): width utilities (u64-to-usize, ascii display width,
display width, is_zero_width for combining/controls/bidi), text wrap
edge cases (zero-width, paragraphs, single-word), panel size with
progress/hints, panel position fallback/no-target/forced-left.

Quake map (12 tests): circle-segment intersection (miss, hit, endpoint,
tangent, zero-length), empty map defaults, floor/ceiling outside rooms,
open area collision, player_start tuple, room count, supportive floor
outside rooms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
